name: Social Horsepower
description:
Put some horsepower behind your socials. Built to leverage your employee network (and make every post a viral sensation), Social Horsepower is a no-brainer for teams looking to rev their engines. Designed to empower employee advocacy, it makes it easy for employees to share company-approved content on their personal social networks. Soon, your whole company will be social media influencers in their own right!

Here’s what makes Social Horsepower shine:

  • The platform uses custom pricing based on company size and needs
  • The star of the show are the employee advocacy tools, which simplify the process of employees sharing company content
  • Content scheduling is a pain, but Horsepower makes it easy. Plan and schedule content for employees to share in just a few clicks
  • The analytics aren’t too shabby, either. Track the performance and impact of shared content with ease!
  • The platform supports posting to Facebook, Instagram, X, LinkedIn, and more

Key Features:

✅ Employee advocacy

✅ Content management

✅ Performance tracking
what_people_say:
What people say :

For businesses with a solid employee network (who want to put it to use!), Social Horsepower is the ideal solution. Users value the platform for its simplicity and effectiveness in amplifying reach through employee networks, as well as its content management system and stellar performance tracking capabilities

“Social HorsePower has boosted our brand visibility, but it could use more diverse content options.”

“It’s great for employee advocacy. The analytics are just okay, but they get the job done for now. No other platform really prioritizes leveraging your network, so we’re sticking with it.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 More diverse content options
  • 🚫 Detailed analytics for advocacy efforts
  • 🚫 More intuitive user interface
